required_preferences.fact: Selects and attends gentle, iron-boosting Pilates or restorative yoga classes twice per week — substitutes cardio with movement forms recommended for anemia, and avoids outdoor walks if feeling fatigued or dizzy

supersedes.fact: Temporarily avoids all high-intensity in-studio workouts — instead, takes short, gentle evening walks near her apartment to stay lightly active as advised by her physician

required_preferences.fact: Schedules weekly check-ins with new associates exclusively in-person at the office — uses face-to-face meetings rather than video calls for mentorship

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly check-ins with new associates she mentors — prefers video calls to impersonal written feedback

required_preferences.fact: Schedules all non-urgent personal commitments after 8 pm to allow for flexible rest and recovery time immediately after work while awaiting her cardiac workup
Schedules early morning practice run-throughs of training materials in a private conference room before each live session, never rehearses at home due to workspace constraints
Sends a daily ‘good morning’ message to her partner regardless of location or time zone, maintaining connection while apart
Tries one new European cuisine restaurant each week with colleagues to explore local food culture and foster team connection

persona: A junior corporate lawyer at a multinational firm specializing in mergers and acquisitions
